aiAnalysis.generatePrompt: Click the button to start AI analysis

aiAnalysis.basicModeDesc: Automatically de-identifies structured PII such as phone numbers, emails, and ID numbers. (Free, instant)
aiAnalysis.aiModeDesc: AI contextually de-identifies names, places, and other PII. (API cost, takes a few seconds)
aiAnalysis.manualAddHint: You can manually add PII that was not automatically detected

hero.title: Safe and Transparent Internal Reporting
hero.subtitle: An anonymous whistleblowing SaaS platform that enhances organizational transparency

anonymous.title: Complete Anonymity
anonymous.description: No personal information collected. IP addresses are hashed for protection

dedicated.title: Dedicated Channels
dedicated.description: Each organization gets a unique URL for their independent reporting channel

ai.title: AI Content Validation
ai.description: Google Gemini AI validates report completeness using the 5W1H framework

multilang.title: Multi-language Support
multilang.description: Supports Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese with automatic IP-based switching

realtime.title: Real-time Communication
realtime.description: Secure comment-based communication between reporters and administrators

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: Visualized dashboard to monitor report status at a glance

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Try free for 1 month, then choose your plan

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: We do not collect any personal information. IP addresses are processed with SHA-256 hashing. Reports can only be checked using the report number and password.
faq.q2: What types of reports can be submitted?
faq.a2: Various types including fraud, embezzlement, workplace harassment, sexual harassment, safety violations, and more. Each organization can customize their report types.
faq.q3: How long is the free trial?
faq.a3: A 1-month free trial is automatically provided upon registration. You can switch to a paid plan at any time during the trial.
faq.a4: Yes, we support Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese with automatic IP-based language detection.

cta.title: Get Started Today
cta.subtitle: Experience our platform with a free 1-month trial
